name: 3dviewer-monorepo
description: 3DViewer — a host-agnostic Three.js viewer for COLMAP reconstructions and 3D meshes, with VS Code and PyCharm hosts over a shared core.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @3dviewer/core && npm run build -w 3dviewer
scripts.watch: npm run build -w @3dviewer/core && npm run watch -w 3dviewer
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @3dviewer/core && npm run lint -w 3dviewer
scripts.test: npm run test -w @3dviewer/core && npm run test -w 3dviewer
